activities_projects.title: Large Exponent Challenge
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Develops skill in calculating larger powers

activities_projects.title: Exponent Law Investigation
activities_projects.objective: Apply multiple exponent rules in one problem
steps: Write each step clearly using exponent rules

activities_projects.title: Power Comparison Puzzle
activities_projects.objective: Compare numbers with different bases and powers

activities_projects.title: Missing Exponent Finder
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands relationship between base and exponent

activities_projects.title: Power Pattern Exploration
activities_projects.objective: Identify patterns in powers of numbers
steps: Describe the pattern in your own words

activities_projects.title: Scientific Notation Activity
activities_projects.objective: Express large numbers using powers of 10
steps: Write large numbers such as 100000 and 5000000
Explain how powers help represent large numbers
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands use of powers in large numbers

activities_projects.title: Real-Life Power Investigation
steps: Find examples where powers are used (computers, science)
Explain how powers simplify large values
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Connects exponent concepts with real life

activities_projects.title: Power of Zero and One Analysis
Exponent Word Problem
steps: Create a real-life situation involving powers
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Applies exponent concepts in practical problems
